title: 有馬記念の後に・稲妻は突然に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap blows Super Creek out of the water in
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Tamamo Cross visits the waiting
room and declares she's postponing competing
for the Dream Trophy in order to face off against
Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The appearance of an unexpected rival dampens
Oguri Cap's victory and marks the start of a new
period of training.
